lane_claim: Paper 7 wave8 LEAF WORKER gate5 W4: own exactly `TraversalCompatibility`. You are a leaf worker and must not spawn descendants. Use $autonomous-orchestrator status/reporting conventions, but do not use Codex built-in subagents. Implement U_{d+1} o iota_d = iota_d o U_d. Return code + targeted validation, exact typed error, or authority escalation. No roadmap-only output, no docs-only output, no repeated blocker decomposition. Touch only the files needed for this symbol family. Do not set promotion bits true unless upstream receipts are inhabited.
